channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade: Big balloons, wet weather and 21 protesters arrested
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade marched, soared and roared into its second century on Thursday despite a drenching rain and a brief disruption from pro-Palestinian demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Northeast hit with rain, snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities
item.description: The U.S. Northeast has been hit with a winter storm that has brought rain and snow amid Thanksgiving Day festivities and disrupted travel plans for those moving around on the holiday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Is your turkey dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia suspends talks on joining the EU for 4 years, accusing the bloc of blackmail
item.description: TBILISI, Georgia (AP) — Georgia is suspending talks on its bid to join the European Union for four years, its prime minister said Thursday, in view of what he described as “blackmail and manipulation” from some of the bloc's politicians, an announcement that outraged the opposition and triggered a n
item.dc:creator: SOPHIKO MEGRELIDZE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Amazon workers on strike from Black Friday to Cyber Monday
item.description: (WFXR) - Amazons workers across 20 countries, including the United States, are striking against what the organizing labor union calls anti-worker and anti-democratic practices.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Jaxtheimer, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Why retailers still see Black Friday as the high point of the holiday shopping season
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — After weeks of plugging increasingly inviting discounts, retailers in the United States and several other countries are preparing for prime time: Black Friday, the bargain bonanza that still reigns as the unofficial kickoff of the holiday shopping season even if it's lost some luster
item.dc:creator: ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Anti-Israel protesters disrupt Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: Anti-Israel protesters descended on the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in New York City on Thursday and tried to block the parade route.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel launches first airstrike on Lebanon since ceasefire after saying Hezbollah violated the truce
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — The Israeli military on Thursday said its warplanes fired on southern Lebanon after detecting Hezbollah activity at a rocket storage facility, the first Israeli airstrike a day after a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah took hold.
item.dc:creator: KAREEM CHEHAYEB and JULIA FRANKEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Avocados, tequila and other iconic Mexican products are jeopardized by Trump's tariff threats
item.description: URUAPAN, Mexico (AP) — Mexicans are worried that threats by Donald Trump to impose 25% tariffs could affect a wide range of iconic Mexican products and threaten entire regional economies. In western Mexico, no crop supplies an income for so many small growers as avocados.
item.dc:creator: ARMANDO SOLÍS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sweden asks for China's cooperation over Baltic Sea cables cut while a Chinese ship was nearby
item.description: HARPSUND, Sweden (AP) — Sweden has formally asked China to cooperate in explaining the recent rupture of two data cables on the Baltic Sea bed in an area where a China-flagged vessel had been sighted, Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: U.S. Postal Service preparing for peak holiday season
item.description: The nation’s postal network is operating effectively without any major reported disruptions, USPS said.
item.dc:creator: Luisa Barrios, NewsNation

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: PIEDMONT, Calif. (AP) — Three people were killed and one seriously injured early Wednesday when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Democrat Derek Tran defeats GOP Rep. Michelle Steel in Southern California swing House district
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Democrat Derek Tran ousted Republican U.S. Rep. Michelle Steel in a Southern California House district Wednesday that was specifically drawn to give Asian Americans a stronger voice on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Birmingham nightclub massacre suspect accused of killing others in four separate shootings: police
item.description: The Alabama suspect accused of opening fire outside a Birmingham nightclub in September is now suspected of killing others in a mass shooting in July, police say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area airport among 10 worst for on-time Thanksgiving travel: report
item.description: Depending on what airport your friends or relatives are flying out of, you may want to show a little extra compassion this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: Oregon tribe has hunting and fishing rights restored under a long-sought court ruling
item.description: LINCOLN CITY, Ore. (AP) — Drumming made the floor vibrate and singing filled the conference room of the Chinook Winds Casino Resort in Lincoln City, on the Oregon coast, as hundreds in tribal regalia danced in a circle.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 3 Americans released in prisoner swap with China
item.description: The Biden administration said they secured the release of three American citizens wrongfully detained in China for years.
item.dc:creator: Raquel Martin, KTLA 5

item.title: North Carolina siblings say late father is D.B. Cooper after finding alleged parachute in home: report
item.description: A pair io siblings believe their late father was D.B. Cooper after finding the alleged parachute used in the sky theft in their North Carolina home, according to media reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boulder Police address JonBenét Ramsey's case after Netflix docuseries premieres
item.description: Without specifically addressing the docuseries, Boulder Police called many of the claims in the show "completely false.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Federal court dismisses defamation lawsuit against Fox News for Jan. 6 conspiracy theory
item.description: CROTON, N.Y. (AP) — A federal judge on Wednesday threw out a defamation lawsuit against Fox News by a former Donald Trump supporter who said he received death threats when the network aired false conspiracy theories about his involvement in the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol insurrection.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: More than $18M in fake Gibson guitars seized by U.S. Customs and Border Protection
item.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection seized more than 3,000 fake Gibson guitars worth nearly $19 million, had they been genuine.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, Fox 5

item.title: This pyramid in Utah is a winery, a temple, and home to the mummy of a religious leader
item.description: Did you know? There's a pyramid in Salt Lake City that is a winery, a temple, and the home of the Summum religion.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Sleeping man saved from rolling off bridge by police officer, Good Samaritan in dramatic video
item.description: Dramatic new video has been released showing the moment a quick-thinking police officer and a Good Samaritan save a sleeping man from rolling off a bridge in Oklahoma.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden team briefed Trump transition on Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team has received briefings from the chief architect of the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire deal under President Biden, a senior administration official said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Schools are bracing for upheaval over fear of mass deportations
item.description: Last time Donald Trump was president, rumors of immigration raids terrorized the Oregon community where Gustavo Balderas was the school superintendent. Word spread that immigration agents were going to try to enter schools.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: China releases 3 Americans in prisoner swap
item.description: Mark Swidan, Kai Li and John Leung were freed after years of talks between U.S. and Chinese officials.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, NewsNation

item.title: 9 indicted in illegal bar scheme across Northeast Ohio
item.description: Nine people in Northeast Ohio are accused of having connections to a “complex network of illegally operated bars.
item.dc:creator: Emily Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Expert-approved gadgets for your holiday gift giving
item.description: BestReviews is reader-supported and may earn an affiliate commission. Looking for some gifting inspiration? Jacob Palmer of BestReviews stopped by to show off some of their highly rated picks in various categories.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Trump vows tariffs over immigration. What the numbers say about border crossings, drugs and crime
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In a Monday evening announcement, President-elect Donald Trump railed against Mexico and Canada, accusing them of allowing thousands of people to enter the U.S.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tank explodes, catches fire near GM facility in Michigan
item.description: A tank containing byproducts from oil drilling operations exploded and caught fire Tuesday near the General Motors Proving Ground in southeastern Michigan, damaging two nearby homes but causing no injuries, a fire chief said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Police say FBI agent sexually assaulted 2 women after promise of free tattoos, modeling
item.description: GAITHERSBURG, Md. (AP) — An FBI agent charged in Maryland with sexually assaulting two women contacted his alleged victims through social media with a promise to give them free tattoos and modeling work, police said Tuesday as they encouraged other potential victims to come forward.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's threat to impose tariffs could raise prices for consumers, colliding with promise for relief
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If Donald Trump makes good on his threat to slap 25% tariffs on everything imported from Mexico and Canada, the price increases that could follow will collide with his campaign promise to give American families a break from inflation.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dog treats distributed to 19 states recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, Fox 5

item.title: HIV-positive organ transplants allowed under new rule
item.description: People with HIV will soon be permitted to receive transplanted kidneys and livers from donors who are also infected with the virus under a new rule approved by the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: Virginia pilot, dog killed in New York plane crash; 2 other dogs found alive
item.description: A Virginia pilot and a rescue dog he was transporting were killed after a plane he was flying crashed in New York on Sunday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Gable, ABC 4

item.title: Earth bids farewell to its temporary 'mini moon': What it was, and where it's going
item.description: Currently, more than 2 million miles away, the object is too small and faint to see without a powerful telescope.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
